revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>user-multi<noinclude>/template</noinclude> | User = {{{1|{{{User|{{{user|}}}}}}}}} | Project = {{{2|{{{Project|{{{project|}}}}}}}}} | Lang = {{{3|{{{Lang|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}} | 1 = t | 2 = c | 3 = dc | 4 = l | 5 = tl | 6 = bl | 7 = lu | 8 = sul | 9 = ca | 10 = ggl | doc = yes }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>user-multi<noinclude>/template</noinclude> | User = {{{1|{{{User|{{{user|}}}}}}}}} | Project = {{{2|{{{Project|{{{project|}}}}}}}}} | Lang = {{{3|{{{Lang|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}} | 1 = t | 2 = c | 3 = dc | 4 = l | 5 = tl | 6 = bl | 7 = lu | 8 = sul | 9 = ca | 10 = ggl | doc = yes }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>user-multi<noinclude>/template</noinclude> | User = {{{1|{{{User|{{{user|}}}}}}}}} | Project = {{{2|{{{Project|{{{project|}}}}}}}}} | Lang = {{{3|{{{Lang|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}} | 1 = t | 2 = c | 3 = dc | 4 = l | 5 = tl | 6 = bl | 7 = lu | 8 = sul | 9 = ca | 10 = ggl | doc = yes }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
